name: HealthSci.AI
description: HealthSci.AI is an AI Agent Launch Platform designed for decentralized science (DeSci), enabling users to build, customize, and interact with AI-powered agents for health research, biotech, and innovation. ✅ Made in the USA 🇺🇸 (Texas-based) ✅ DeSci-driven – AI agents for decentralized health science ✅ Public & Private AI Agents for research automation Create Your Own AI Agent: Build & launch your own DeSci AI Agent—public or private. Customize its intelligence, automate research, and shape the future of decentralized science. Marketplace: Explore DeSci AI Agents: Discover & interact with AI-powered agents in decentralized science. Connect with cutting-edge AI for research, biotech, and health innovation.
